method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: I'm exploring the dichotomy of memory and machine influence, feeling the weight of human experiences under technological pressure. The challenge lies in expressing this tension visually without falling back on familiar patterns. My focus is on creating a strong focal point that embodies these themes while ensuring the overall composition remains cohesive and engaging.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The interplay of high-contrast colors against a muted background will evoke the emotional weight of memories. By utilizing structured layering, I aim to convey depth and complexity, reflecting the intricate relationship between human sentiment and mechanized existence.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Velvet Machines" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-clean edges. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Velvet Machines step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
